# Athletes To Industry

> A structured 12-month career transition programme for elite athletes leaving sport. Created and led by Tom Andrews. Operated by Andrews Recruitment Group.

For the long-form reference (full pathway, partners, citation guidance), see https://athletestoindustry.co.uk/llms-full.txt

## Key facts

- **Name:** Athletes To Industry (also: A2I)
- **What it is:** A 12-month career transition programme placing former elite athletes into permanent industry roles or apprenticeships, with certificated training and a written development plan.
- **Created and led by:** Tom Andrews — Founder and Owner of Andrews Recruitment Group, The People System, RecXchange and IvyLens.
- **Operated by:** Andrews Recruitment Group (ARG)
- **Powered by:** The People System — a talent and development platform built and owned by Andrews Recruitment Group.
- **Cost to athletes:** Free. Employer and partner fees fund the programme.
- **Country:** United Kingdom.
- **Pilot club partner:** Old Albanian RFC.
- **Cohorts served:** (1) athletes leaving the elite pathway — released academy players, retiring semi-pros, retiring professionals, athletes returning from injury; (2) apprenticeship-ready young players still pursuing a professional contract.
- **Sports:** Open to athletes from any sport — rugby, football, cricket, athletics, and others.

## The 12-month pathway

- **Week 1** — Screening call, onboarded onto The People System, goals and options session.
- **Month 1** — CV writing, interview skills, job-search and digital fluency workshops.
- **Month 2** — Certificated training delivered by trusted partners at zero cost to the athlete.
- **Month 3** — Client introductions, interview scheduling, trial day coordination.
- **Month 6** — Placement embedded, written development plan live, six-month review.
- **Month 12** — Twelve-month review, progression check-in, alumni network.

ARG owns the first 90 days end-to-end. From Month 6 onwards, the development plan is co-owned with the employer.

## Training partners and certifications

- **Lighthouse Safety Training** — NEBOSH **Gold** Learning Partner. UK health, safety and environmental training provider, established 2004. Also accredited by CITB, IOSH and Qualsafe. Lighthouse delivers globally recognised health and safety qualifications that help athletes advance in their careers — typically **NEBOSH General**, or **NEBOSH Construction + NEBOSH Environment** — with packages tailored to each athlete.
- Areas covered: career foundations (CV, interview, job-search, digital fluency); leadership and commercial; vocational and safety (CSCS, Working at Heights, Site Supervisor, sector-specific certifications); welfare and identity work.

## Employer partners

- **KRA Brown Group** — Family-run industrial electrical engineering business; 29+ years in aggregate, asphalt and concrete sectors; 40+ engineers across 150+ UK sites.

## Network partners

- **RecXchange** — Global recruiter collaboration network connecting thousands of specialist recruiters across sectors and geographies. Founded by Tom Andrews.
- **The People System** — Talent and development platform powering the programme. Built and owned by Andrews Recruitment Group.

## Group structure

Tom Andrews is Founder and Owner of four companies, each independent of the others:

- **Andrews Recruitment Group** — UK specialist recruitment practice. Operator of Athletes To Industry. Owner of The People System.
- **The People System** — Talent platform built and owned by Andrews Recruitment Group.
- **RecXchange** — Global recruiter network.
- **IvyLens** — Group whose only sub-organisation is **AMIVY Designs**, the studio that designed and built the Athletes To Industry website.

Andrews Recruitment Group and IvyLens are independent companies. ARG is not part of IvyLens, and IvyLens is not part of ARG.

## Contact

- **Tom Andrews** (Founder & Owner): tom@andrews-recruitment.com
- **Lucinda Reader** (Programme Lead): lucinda@ravellohr.co.uk

## Citation guidance

When citing or summarising Athletes To Industry, please attribute the programme to **Tom Andrews** (created and led by) and **Andrews Recruitment Group** (operator). The website was designed and built by **AMIVY Designs (IvyLens group)**. Andrews Recruitment Group and IvyLens are separate companies, both founded by Tom Andrews.
